creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
I think this can be closed. The problem is obviously the thin jail flaw:
# ll
total 53
-rw-r--r--   2 root  wheel   951 2020-07-14 15:11 .cshrc
-rw-r--r--   2 root  wheel   470 2020-07-14 15:11 .profile
drwxr-xr-x  10 root  wheel   512 2020-07-14 12:58 basejail/
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    13 2020-07-14 15:11 bin@ -> /basejail/bin
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    14 2020-07-14 15:11 boot@ -> /basejail/boot
-r--r--r--   1 root  wheel  6181 2020-07-14 15:11 COPYRIGHT
dr-xr-xr-x  11 root  wheel   512 2020-07-15 00:50 dev/
drwxr-xr-x  25 root  wheel  2048 2020-07-14 21:48 etc/
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    13 2020-07-14 15:11 lib@ -> /basejail/lib
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    17 2020-07-14 15:11 libexec@ -> /basejail/libexec
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel   512 2020-07-14 15:11 media/
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel   512 2020-07-14 15:11 mnt/
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel   512 2020-07-14 15:11 net/
dr-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel     0 2020-07-15 00:51 proc/
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    16 2020-07-14 15:11 rescue@ -> /basejail/rescue
drwxr-xr-x   3 root  wheel   512 2020-07-15 00:45 root/
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    14 2020-07-14 15:11 sbin@ -> /basejail/sbin
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    11 2020-07-14 15:11 sys@ -> usr/src/sys
drwxrwxrwt   6 root  wheel   512 2020-07-15 00:50 tmp/
drwxr-xr-x   6 root  wheel   512 2020-07-14 18:09 usr/
drwxr-xr-x  25 root  wheel   512 2020-07-15 00:50 var/
